mapper.select: SELECT id, name, parent_id, level, sort_order, color, created_at, updated_at FROM issue_categories ORDER BY level, sort_order, id
SELECT id, name, parent_id, level, sort_order, color, created_at, updated_at FROM issue_categories WHERE level = #{level} ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT id, name, parent_id, level, sort_order, color, created_at, updated_at FROM issue_categories WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO issue_categories (name, parent_id, level, sort_order, color, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{level}, #{sortOrder}, #{color}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE issue_categories SET name = #{name}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, color = #{color}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issue_categories WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
